description: 5 symptoms all caused by the same DNS resolver failure. Should form 1 cluster despite different alert categories.

alerts.text: Authentication service failing: socket.gaierror Name or service not known for auth-service.internal. DNS resolution failing.
Payment API timeout: cannot connect to payment.internal. All DNS queries failing to nameserver 10.0.0.53. Nameserver unreachable.
Worker service unable to reach database: db.internal DNS resolution failed. Error -2 name or service not known.
Cache service connection refused: redis.internal cannot be resolved. DNS failure causing service mesh breakdown.
Health checks failing across all services. All inter-service calls returning connection refused. Internal DNS resolver 10.0.0.53 down.
